ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field (e.g., Goalkeeper, Defender) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the player's recent performance */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the team ends */,
  "player_market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player in millions */,
  "player_injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., Manchester, England) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes (e.g., Premier League) */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's current manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the player */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "rating_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user along with the rating */,
  "rating_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who submitted the rating (for security and fraud detection) */,
  "rating_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to submit the rating (e.g., Mobile, Desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expert_ratings" (
  "expert_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expert rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being rated */,
  "expert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expert who rated the player */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the expert (1-10) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "expert_rating_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the expert along with the rating */,
  "expert_rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the expert rating (e.g., Expert Panel, Analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fantasy_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy point entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points earned by the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the points were earned */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "fantasy_points_source" TEXT /* Source of the fantasy points (e.g., Official League, Third-Party Provider) */,
  "fantasy_points_details" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of how the fantasy points were earned (e.g., Goals, Assists, Clean Sheets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fantasy_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  "user_registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Suspended, Banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
